what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-assets channel, binding an attachment id to a target image URI and an addition timestamp.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
Added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone.
standouts: Target URI contains a space and parentheses: 'image://design-assets/icons/image (39)'.
It is a ledger-style record for a design-assets channel attachment.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Attachment id follows an 'att-' prefix with a hash.
Timestamp is recorded in ISO 8601 UTC format.
concerns: The target URI includes a space and parentheses, which may be unusual or fragile for URI resolution.
Only metadata is present; the actual image content or validity is not verifiable from this file.
notes: This file is a ledger entry that registers an image attachment for a design-assets channel icon.
questions: What does 'image (39)' refer to within the design-assets/icons namespace?
Is the target URI resolvable by the consuming system?
Who or what process added this attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record an attachment, and the file does exactly that.
intention_signals: To create a durable, referenceable record that links a design image asset to a channel attachment id so it can be located and used later.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped identity and locator for a design image attachment within a channel ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter ledger record for an image attachment (att-f8b4eaf1) in the design-assets channel pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (39).
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make retrievable a design-assets channel image attachment by id, type, target URI, and addition time.
